title: [spec-compliance] duplicate TrickleSafeLivenessPolicy trait in routing.rs after recent fixes
description: The last 20 commits (esp. 197af20f4 and related worker fixes to rust/lichen-node/src/routing.rs) left duplicate trait definitions for TrickleSafeLivenessPolicy (one under cfg(feature="std"), another at L175). This violates clean code/spec implementation. Also verify liveness policy against draft-lichen-rpl-lora-00.md:689 link timeout=10s (DEFAULT_NEIGHBORS_TIMEOUT_MS matches) and RFC6206 Trickle suppression rules. Reviewed git log --oneline -20, routing changes, spec/05-routing.md, spec/drafts/draft-lichen-rpl-lora-00.md. No other MUST violations found in constants (MAX_NEIGHBORS=16, MOP=1, MRHOF_OCP=1).
